items.title: Spain Goalkeeper Unai Simón Wins Golden Glove After Historic World Cup
items.summary: Spain goalkeeper Unai Simón has been awarded the 2026 FIFA World Cup Golden Glove for his historic World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: How the World Cup has affected your Premier League team
items.summary: Now Spain have been crowned world champions after victory over Argentina in New Jersey, attention will quickly shift to the new domestic season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Duckett 141 trumps Rohit 138 in Lord's run-fest
items.summary: England set India 388 in this series decider, and then refused to blink with the ball to secure a 2-1 series win - their first against India since 2018
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
